creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
Created attachment 251538
Patch for upgrade of port to version 6.32/00, revision 2

Hello,

I have accommodated the plist issues in the attached patch.
The plist issues are actually nice to see because the fix is to entirely remove
some of the arch-dependent plist substitutions - finally!

Note that the attached patch is a diff with respect to the latest port on the
main branch (port revision 0), while the attached patch claims to be port
revision 2.

Cheers
